blocks.text: Hovland one shot back — Scandinavian showdown brewing at Hilton Head
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 in progress — rain hunting CS2 Major glory in Brazil
Arsenal lead City by 6 points with six to play — Sunday at the Etihad is as close to a title decider as this season gets. Liverpool need a derby win to bounce back from Tuesday's 0-2 PSG humiliation.
